Compliance.description: CMS registered medical scheme with Momentum Metropolitan backing; FSB/FSCA compliant; no major violations found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 2.42/5 (low) for Momentum overall; mixed medical reviews; some award recognition contradicts low scores.

Product Value.description: HealthReturns savings-linked wellness rewards are differentiated; 10 plans; Ingwe affordable tier; Multiply integration.

Innovation.description: HealthReturns (up to 100% back on healthy behaviors), Multiply ecosystem, app, digital claims, preventive programs.

Customer Support.description: Dedicated support channels; app; low HelloPeter score but institutional client relationships strong.

Accessibility & Security.description: POPIA-compliant financial services entity; app and web access; good data governance as major financial services brand.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Ingwe from ~R1,700/mo; Evolve from ~R5,500/mo; Summit Comprehensive from ~R15,000+/mo

socialSentiment.summary: Wellness programs praised; claim/service complaints dominate; Multiply loyalty positive.
